heritage.title: Our Heritage
heritage.subtitle: A Legacy Woven in Gold
heritage.story: Kumaran Silks' humble beginnings have evolved into a global textile powerhouse with the finest textiles that reflect India's rich heritage and craftsmanship. Our journey from a small outlet in T. Nagar to a celebrated name in textiles is a story of passion, dedication, and an unwavering commitment to quality.
heritage.founder_quote: "Every thread we weave carries the soul of our tradition and the dream of our future."

timeline.1925: Kumaran Silks founded in T. Nagar, Chennai
timeline.1985: Expanded to become Chennai's premier silk destination
timeline.2010: Introduced PCR Collection for men's traditional wear
timeline.2026: Digital Flagship launch — bringing heritage online

items.text: The quality of Kumaran Silks sarees is unmatched. I wore their Kanjivaram for my wedding and received endless compliments.
items.name: Priya Raghavan

items.text: Walking into Kumaran Silks is like stepping into a world of pure luxury. Their collection is breathtaking.
items.name: Meenakshi Sundaram

items.text: Three generations of my family have bought sarees only from Kumaran Silks. The trust is earned, not given.
items.name: Lakshmi Narayanan

store.title: Visit Our Heritage Store

footer.about_text: Since 1925, Kumaran Silks has been Chennai's most trusted destination for pure silk sarees, handwoven with love and tradition.
